scores.correctness_notes: Accurately covers all three notice types, identity/deduplication mechanism, persistence, and charm observation pattern. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: The detailed Notice fields table (repeat_after, expire_after, last_repeated, occurrences, etc.) and the get_notices() API call may be extrapolated beyond what the gold standard confirms. The LazyNotice class name is not in the gold standard and may be fabricated. Minor risk but not clearly wrong.
